class HexaLang < Formula
  desc "The Perfect Number Programming Language — every constant from n=6"
  homepage "https://github.com/need-singularity/hexa-lang"
  url "https://github.com/need-singularity/hexa-lang.git", tag: "v0.2.0"
  license "MIT"
  head "https://github.com/need-singularity/hexa-lang.git", branch: "main"

  depends_on "rust" => :build

  def install
    system "cargo", "install", *std_cargo_args
  end

  test do
    # Test REPL exits cleanly
    pipe_output("#{bin}/hexa", ":quit

# Homebrew Tap — need-singularity

Homebrew formulae for [need-singularity](https://github.com/need-singularity) projects.

## Installation

```bash
brew tap need-singularity/tap
brew install hexa-lang
```

## Available Formulae

| Formula | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [hexa-lang](https://github.com/need-singularity/hexa-lang) | The Perfect Number Programming Language (n=6) |
